sections.title: First time talking or after killing one of them

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not going to hurt you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm going to slay you all, you evil goblins!

sections.title: After telling them you won't hurt them

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not going to tread on your feet.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: Beware of swamp gas! Look out for the warning marks!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: I'm a bit worried about the increase of humans these days.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you live underground. The weather is always the same!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know, out of the caves, in the open air, with sunshine and wide open spaces!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: You're the human who secured peace between the Dorgeshuun and Lumbridge, aren't you?

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: Thank you so much! I was worried it was a return to the times of war, but perhaps surface-dwellers are not so bad.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: Watch out! You don't want to let a naked flame near swamp gas! Look out for the warning marks.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: Don't shine that thing in my eyes!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: What are you doing down here without a lamp?

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: Here, I have a spare torch.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: But be careful not to let it near swamp gas! Watch out for the warning marks.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: You haven't got a tinderbox! What if your light goes out?
